mapper.sql: id, order_fno, order_no, item_no, supplier_code, trans_type, batch_no, hope_export_date, pre_qty, send_time, model_no, dlv_date, customer_no, available_customers, apply_no, apply_id, apply_qty, warehouse_code, rohs, remark, apply_psn, apply_dept_no, apply_time, inventory_property_id, use_qty, manu_order_no, manu_fact_supplier_code, verification_date, manu_dlv_date, status, del_flag, can_use_flag, version, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, apply_detail_id, supplier_operate_time, supplier_expinv_code, supplier_expinv_remark, remain_qty, terminate_date, final_account_date, liquidation_date
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_prepare_order
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_prepare_order (id, order_fno, order_no, item_no, supplier_code, trans_type, batch_no, hope_export_date, pre_qty, send_time, model_no, dlv_date, customer_no, update dbo.ops_prepare_order
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_fno = #{record.orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trans_type = #{record.transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
batch_no = #{record.batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hope_export_date = #{record.hopeExportDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pre_qty = #{record.preQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
send_time = #{record.sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_date = #{record.dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
available_customers = #{record.availableCustomers,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
apply_no = #{record.applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_id = #{record.applyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
apply_qty = #{record.applyQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rohs = #{record.rohs,jdbcType=CHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
apply_psn = #{record.applyPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
apply_dept_no = #{record.applyDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_time = #{record.applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
inventory_property_id = #{record.inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
use_qty = #{record.useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
manu_order_no = #{record.manuOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manu_fact_supplier_code = #{record.manuFactSupplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
verification_date = #{record.verificationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
manu_dlv_date = #{record.manuDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
can_use_flag = #{record.canUseFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_detail_id = #{record.applyDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
supplier_operate_time = #{record.supplierOperateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
supplier_expinv_code = #{record.supplierExpinvCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_expinv_remark = #{record.supplierExpinvRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remain_qty = #{record.remainQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
terminate_date = #{record.terminateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
final_account_date = #{record.finalAccountDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
liquidation_date = #{record.liquidationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.ops_prepare_order
order_fno = #{orderFno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trans_type = #{transType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
batch_no = #{batchNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hope_export_date = #{hopeExportDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
pre_qty = #{preQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
send_time = #{sendTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_date = #{dlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
available_customers = #{availableCustomers,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
apply_no = #{applyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_id = #{applyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
apply_qty = #{applyQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rohs = #{rohs,jdbcType=CHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
apply_psn = #{applyPsn,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
apply_dept_no = #{applyDeptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_time = #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
inventory_property_id = #{inventoryPropertyId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
use_qty = #{useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
manu_order_no = #{manuOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manu_fact_supplier_code = #{manuFactSupplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
verification_date = #{verificationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
manu_dlv_date = #{manuDlvDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
can_use_flag = #{canUseFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
apply_detail_id = #{applyDetailId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
supplier_operate_time = #{supplierOperateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
supplier_expinv_code = #{supplierExpinvCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_expinv_remark = #{supplierExpinvRemark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
remain_qty = #{remainQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
terminate_date = #{terminateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
final_account_date = #{finalAccountDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
liquidation_date = #{liquidationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
